ocr_text: TEW22 (Media watermark); СВОБОДА ІДУ НА ВИ (Freedom, I come at you); SUBSCRIBE (Media ticker); FOLLOW US ON facebook (Social media handle)
assessment_reasoning: The image clearly depicts a military aircraft operating in a field. While the specific type is not identifiable, the presence of an aircraft in this context suggests potential military activity and warrants a moderate threat assessment. The location within Ukraine further supports this assessment, given the ongoing conflict.
